video_info.title: UFC Fight Night - Fiziev vs Torres
video_info.shortDescription: UFC Fight Night: Fiziev vs Torres features a high-stakes lightweight clash as Rafael Fiziev looks to bounce back from a rough run against surging knockout specialist Manuel Torres. Fiziev brings technical striking and experience, while Torres thrives on fast, explosive finishes, setting up a classic battle between skill and power. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.

Fiziev brings technical striking and experience, while Torres thrives on fast, explosive finishes, setting up a classic battle between skill and power. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.
